title: iDiscoveri Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: iDiscoveri Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education family as a Subject Matter Expert in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education:
iDiscoveri Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education!
